scripts.wire:sepolia-to-amoy: hardhat run scripts/wire-endpoint.js --network sepolia --source sepolia --remote amoy
scripts.wire:amoy-to-sepolia: hardhat run scripts/wire-endpoint.js --network amoy --source amoy --remote sepolia
scripts.demo:publish:sepolia: hardhat run scripts/publish-intent.js --network sepolia --source sepolia --destination amoy
scripts.demo:attest:on-amoy: hardhat run scripts/submit-attestation.js --network amoy --source sepolia --destination amoy
